---
title: "About"
---

The Sabrhood is a page dedicated to providing our internet neighbors with advanced stats, metrics, and insights in MLB and MiLB.

The Sabrhood's head contributor and anaylst is Tyler Schultz. Tyler is a graduate student at the University of Florida's College of Journalism and Communications after completing his B.A. in Sports Management with a minor in Statistics; also at the University of Florida. He is a lead sport researcher for the on-campus sport radio station, WRUF. 

Follow our Twitter/X \@ [thesabrhood](https://x.com/thesabrhood)!

![](images/Headshot2Final.png){fig-align="center" width="214"}
